ironRules.rule: Structure validation (F195) executes as ORDER 1 — before SETNX. Invalid schema never consumes an idempotency key.
T191 DagCycleDetector called inline after SETNX and before SchemaQueued. CycleDetected → SchemaRejected. T194 not reached.
BREAKING changeType routes to SchemaApprovalRequired — never to SchemaQueued. ADDITIVE with T191 PASS routes to SchemaQueued.
storeDocument(audit) executes BEFORE any enqueue call. DNA-8.
